results.title: Pakistan Embassy Distances Itself from Controversial Mosque Construction in Japan
results.description: The Pakistani embassy in Japan has distanced itself from a mosque project in Kawagoe that was built without necessary local approvals. This controversy arose after Ambassador Abdul Hameed attended the mosque's inauguration, prompting scrutiny of the embassy's involvement. The embassy clarified that it had no connection to the project and urged the Pakistani community in Japan to comply with local regulations. The situation has sparked criticism from within Japan's Pakistani Muslim community, highlighting the importance of transparency and adherence to local laws in religious construction projects. This incident has reignited discussions on compliance and community engagement in Japan's strict planning environment.

results.title: DK Shivakumar Set to Take Oath as Karnataka Chief Minister
results.description: କର୍ଣ୍ଣାଟକରେ ଆଜିଠୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେଉଛି DK ରାଜ୍। କର୍ଣ୍ଣାଟକର ପରବର୍ତ୍ତି ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଭାବେ ଶପଥ ନେବେ ଡି.କେ. ଶିବକୁମାର। ରାଜ୍ୟପାଳ ଥାୱରଚନ୍ଦ ଗେହଲଟ, ଡିକେ ଶିବକୁମାରଙ୍କୁ ପଦ ଓ ଗୋପନୀୟତାର ଶପଥ ପାଠ କରାଇବେ। ୧୨ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀଙ୍କ ସହ ଜଣେ ଉପମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ବି ଆଜି ଶପଥ ନେଇପାରନ୍ତି। #DKShivakumar #Karnataka #KarnatakaCM #Congress #PoliticalNews #BreakingNews #Bengaluru #Siddaramaiah #MallikarjunKharge #RahulGandhi #SoniaGandhi #PriyankaGandhi #IndiaPolitics #KarnatakaPolitics #LatestNews #OTV A new political chapter is set to begin in Karnataka as senior Congress leader D. K. Shivakumar is scheduled to take oath as the state's next Chief Minister. The swearing-in ceremony is expected to be held in the presence of top Congress leaders and several dignitaries. results.title: Sikh leaders denounce Southampton Nihang killer, stress actions contradict faith
results.description: Sikh leaders have condemned the actions of Vickrum Digwa, the 23-year-old Nihang Sikh from Southampton jailed for life with a minimum term of 21 years for the murder of 18-year-old student Henry Nowak, saying he alone was responsible for the killing and that his actions were contrary to Sikh teachings and values. Digwa was convicted [...]
